role: This directory contains integration tests that validate the core modules, boundaries, CLI, platform configuration, schema compliance, and system-level behaviors of the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively, these tests enforce architectural boundaries, CLI correctness, platform-specific configuration resolution, schema compliance, and end-to-end system integration, ensuring the ArchSpine system remains modular, secure, and robust across all major components.

children.role: Test suite enforcing architectural boundaries and module contracts within the ArchSpine system.
This directory contains integration and unit test suites for the ArchSpine CLI commands.
Provides platform-specific resolution of the global ArchSpine configuration directory.
Directory for schema validation and compliance testing of ArchSpine spine unit files.

This directory aggregates all test suites for the ArchSpine mirror system, covering unit and integration tests for core utilities, CLI governance, error handling, footprint calculation, manifest persistence, distributed locking, security boundaries, semantic drift detection, and spine gate infrastructure.
